description_long: This object is a stylized bunch of grapes composed of numerous rounded, purple grape spheres clustered together in a conical formation. The grapes are tightly packed, forming a dense and compact bunch that tapers toward the bottom. At the top, a thick, brown stem is visible, with a single large, green leaf extending to one side, adding a touch of foliage. The surface of the grapes appears matte and slightly rough, with blocky, pixelated edges that give the object a voxel-like appearance. The coloration is vivid, with deep purple grapes contrasting against the green leaf and brown stem. The overall form is visually striking and easily recognizable as a bunch of grapes, suitable for decorative or illustrative use in an urban environment.
description: A tightly packed, conical bunch of purple grapes with a brown stem and a large green leaf, rendered in a blocky, voxel style. The grapes are dense and visually vibrant, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full bunch of purple grapes, the brown stem, and the green leaf prominently displayed on the right.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thickness of the bunch, with the green leaf covering much of the left side and the brown stem visible at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the grape bunch, with the brown stem and green leaf extending to the left, and the grapes appearing more uniform.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the green leaf on the right, with the brown stem at the top and the grape bunch's depth visible.
attribute_bunch_arrangement: Tightly packed, conical bunch with a dense and compact organization.
